sentences.arabic: الْكَرَمُ وَالسَّخَاءُ مِنْ أَبْرَزِ صِفَاتِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ.
sentences.translation: Darežljivost i velikodušnost bile su najistaknutije odlike Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: Generosity and magnanimity were among the most prominent qualities of the Prophet, peace be upon him.

sentences.arabic: رَوَى ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ «كَانَ أَجْوَدَ النَّاسِ، وَكَانَ أَجْوَدَ مَا يَكُونُ فِي رَمَضَانَ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Ibn Abbas, radijallahu anhuma, prenosi da je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, 'bio najdarežljiviji od svih ljudi, a bio je najdarežljiviji u ramazanu.'
sentences.translationEn: Ibn Abbas, may Allah be pleased with them both, narrated that the Prophet, peace be upon him, 'was the most generous of people, and he was most generous in Ramadan.'

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَعْطَى النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ كُلَّ مَنْ سَأَلَهُ وَلَمْ يَرُدَّ أَحَدًا بِيَدٍ خَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi Buhari u Kitabu bedžil-vahji] Poslanik je davao svakom ko ga je zamolio i nikog nije otpuštao praznih ruku.
sentences.translationEn: [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation] The Prophet gave to everyone who asked him and never turned anyone away empty-handed.

sentences.arabic: فَالْجُودُ وَالسَّخَاءُ يُقَرِّبَانِ الْعَبْدَ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَمِنَ النَّاسِ، وَيَدُلَّانِ عَلَى ثِقَتِهِ بِأَنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الرَّزَّاقُ.
sentences.translation: Darežljivost i velikodušnost zbližavaju roba s Allahom i s ljudima, i ukazuju na njegovo povjerenje da je Allah Onaj koji opskrbljuje.
sentences.translationEn: Generosity brings a servant closer to Allah and to people, and demonstrates his trust that Allah is the Provider.
